    1. handle(Object)

Interface ResponseHandler

All Known Implementing Classes:
AddReservationHandler, AddSpecialDateHandler, AddWaitingHandler, CancelReservationHandler, CancelWaitingHandler, CreateOpeningHoursHandler, DeleteOpeningHoursHandler, DeleteSpecialDateHandler, DeleteTableHandler, ForgotCodeGuestHandler, ForgotCodeHandler, GetAllReservationsHandler, GetAllTablesHandler, GetAllUsersHandler, GetAvailableTimesHandler, GetNearestAvailableTimesHandler, GetRestaurantSettingsHandler, GetUserInformationHandler, GetUserReservationsHandler, InsertTableHandler, LoginHandler, LogoutHandler, MarkNotifiedHandler, PaymentHandler, RegisterHandler, ReportHandler, ReservationAffectedHandler, SeatCustomerHandler, UpdateRegularClosingTimeHandler, UpdateRegularOpeningTimeHandler, UpdateReservationHandler, UpdateSpecialDateHandler, UpdateTableHandler, UpdateUserHandler, WeeklyWaitingListHandler
public interface ResponseHandler
Represents a handler for processing server responses. Implementations of this interface define how to handle the data returned from the server, such as updating the UI or triggering other application logic.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    handle(Object data)
    Handles the server response data.

  • Method Details

    • handle

      void handle(Object data)
      Handles the server response data.
      Parameters:
      data - the response object from the server
